title: NarcoleTweaks
description: A modpack For PvP and CPvP a Combined Project of Narcole Tech and Minecraft Hacked
body:
# This Project is Shifted To Kasai PvP Modpack!!!!!
[Link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ksp)
# Narcole Tweaks 

**A combined Project Of Minecraft Hacked and Narcole People.**
**A modpack for Minecraft PvP and to increase FPS**

## Important Notice ⚠

### This Modpack isnt Tested on any servers and it is still in Beta ⚠☣☢

## Information

A modpack with **Endless possibilities** Made for **Minecraft PvP Community** To Get them on the **top Of
the LeaderBoard**,and Get them the **Best Performance Possible**. 

We have mods like **Sodium , iris, lithium, indium, Cullling & and More Culling (extra).**

And Also We have some Mods to **improve your PvP** Like **Apple Skin** a Mod that is very helpful when holding an eat-able , and Morecosmetics **Who dont Love Cosmetics**,

**Why?** **Lose the Optifine Zoom** when **Using this Modpack** Now You Can not Just Zoom But now **you can Zooomify** Thanks to Its Developer
